import io
import string
import list

fn is_whitespace(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for x in xs
      if not inserted and v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn parse_token(_ tok: String, _ acc: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(tok)
    acc
  else
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      insert_sorted(acc, v)
    when None
      acc
    end
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if is_whitespace(c)
      sorted = parse_token(token, sorted)
      token = ""
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
sorted = parse_token(token, sorted)

mut output = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    output = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    output = "#{output} #{x}"
  end
end
println(output)
